_provider_help: "ccusage" = fully local & official-safe (estimates vs limits). "oauth" = exact 5h/weekly % from Anthropic's /api/oauth/usage (undocumented, sends a claude-code User-Agent).
_refreshSeconds_help: Keep >=180 when provider=oauth to avoid the rate-limited 429 bucket.
_plan_help: blockTokenLimit/weeklyTokenBudget let ccusage mode show a % ring. Leave null to auto-use your largest previous 5h block as the 5h denominator; weekly ring then shows raw tokens with no %.

oauth._help: credentialsPath empty = auto-detect ~/.claude/.credentials.json. Token resolution order: manualToken > tokenEnvVar > credentials file.
